scripts.prepublish:check: turbo run build check-types test lint && bun scripts/preflight.ts
scripts.publish:dry: turbo run build check-types test lint && bun scripts/preflight.ts --skip-changeset && bun scripts/publish-packages.ts --dry-run
scripts.publish:local: turbo run build check-types test lint && bun scripts/preflight.ts --skip-changeset && bun scripts/publish-packages.ts --yes
